title: pocketnet-node-doctor plan.json (v1)
description: Machine-readable artifact emitted by `pocketnet-node-doctor diagnose` and consumed by `pocketnet-node-doctor apply`. Read-only after emission. Self-authenticating via the `self_hash` field per the pre-spec Implementation Context canonical-form rule (sorted JSON keys, no insignificant whitespace, UTF-8).
$comment: Canonical-form serialization for hash inputs: sorted JSON keys, no insignificant whitespace, UTF-8 (pre-spec Implementation Context). The `self_hash` field is SHA-256 over the canonical-form payload with `self_hash` removed.

format_version.description: Plan-format version. Initial value 1. Increments on schema-incompatible change (post-v1).

block_height.description: Pocketnet block height the canonical was minted at. Verbatim from manifest.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 trust-root value the manifest was authenticated against. Equals the compiled-in trust-root constant for a successful diagnose run.

pocketnet_core_version.description: Exact pocketnet-core version the canonical was built against. Verbatim from manifest.

divergences.description: One element per divergent file or per divergent main.sqlite3 page run. May be empty (a node identical to canonical produces a zero-entry plan per spec acceptance scenario US-001 #2).

self_hash.description: SHA-256 over the plan's canonical-form payload with `self_hash` removed (sorted JSON keys, no insignificant whitespace, UTF-8). Tamper-detection contract: re-computing `self_hash` from the plan's other fields and comparing against this value detects any post-emission mutation.

path.description: Forward-slash relative path rooted at the pocketnet data directory. No leading slash, no `..` segments. Verbatim from manifest entry.

pages.description: Subset of the canonical entry's pages array — only pages where local differs from canonical (or where the local file is too short to reach the offset). Strictly sorted by offset ascending; no duplicates.

offset.description: Byte offset of the page within the file. Non-negative multiple of 4096.

expected_hash.description: Canonical page hash, verbatim from manifest entry. Apply fetches the chunk at this offset and verifies its SHA-256 equals this value before atomic-renaming into place.

path.description: Forward-slash relative path rooted at the pocketnet data directory.

expected_hash.description: Canonical whole-file SHA-256, verbatim from manifest entry.

expected_source.description: Optional. Present when the file is missing locally (per Chunk 003's EC-002 partial-pocketdb plan contract). Apply consumes this to skip pre-apply shadowing (no original to shadow).
